title: Documentation, Demonstration, Independent Defense, and Reflective Transfer · Product Forensics
summary: A preserved decision record for documentation, demonstration, independent defense, and reflective transfer contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in public capstone dossier and independent defense and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case…
objectives: Provide affected-user, operator, maintainer, contributor, reviewer, security, accessibility, and decision-maker documentation at appropriate detail.
Demonstrate ordinary, changed, boundary, inaccessible-before-repair, failure, recovery, rollback, and stakeholder-outcome cases from the reviewed artifact.
Answer unseen causal, counterexample, tradeoff, ethics, accessibility, security, data, operations, and transfer questions using inspectable evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Documentation
steps.instruction:
debug case — A polished final story hides failed hypotheses, assistance, affected-user evidence, accessibility, threat decisions, incident recovery, and remaining non-claims. The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Provide affected-user, operator, maintainer, contributor, reviewer, security, accessibility, and decision-maker documentation at appropriate detail.

Inspect the Audience Documentation trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Documentation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for provide affected-user, operator, maintainer, contributor, reviewer, security, accessibility, and decision-maker documentation at appropriate detail. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Documentation, keep Audience Documentation connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Audience Documentation, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Documentation, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Audience Documentation precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Documentation, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A polished final story hides failed hypotheses, assistance, affected-user evidence, accessibility, threat decisions, incident recovery, and remaining non-claims. The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Provide affected-user, operator, maintainer, contributor, reviewer, security, accessibility, and decision-maker documentation at appropriate detail.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Documentation, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: One comprehensive README serves every audience well.

stimulus.title: Audience Documentation case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A polished final story hides failed hypotheses, assistance, affected-user evidence, accessibility, threat decisions, incident recovery, and remaining non-claims. The debug variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Provide affected-user, operator, maintainer, contributor, reviewer, security, accessibility, and decision-maker documentation at appropriate detail.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: One comprehensive README serves every audience well.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Provide affected-user, operator, maintainer, contributor, reviewer, security, accessibility, and decision-maker documentation at appropriate detail. Artifact under review: public capstone dossier and independent defense.

options.text: The Audience Documentation record says public capstone dossier and independent defense looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Audience Documentation.

For inspect the failure record, apply Audience Documentation without its stated preconditions, omit the public capstone dossier and independent defense trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Audience Documentation for public capstone dossier and independent defense.
The record names the assumption, applies Audience Documentation, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Reflective Transfer
steps.instruction:
Append a capstone-reflective-transfer-wp8pxd: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Reflective Transfer.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Reflective Transfer into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Reflective Transfer, keep Reflective Transfer connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.code:
capstone-reflective-transfer-wp8pxd:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Reflective Transfer structural check is only one gate. public capstone dossier and independent defense must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Reflective Transfer, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Reflective Transfer precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Reflective Transfer, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A polished final story hides failed hypotheses, assistance, affected-user evidence, accessibility, threat decisions, incident recovery, and remaining non-claims. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Compare initial predictions with outcomes, explain changed mental models, identify retained misconceptions, and design a harder independent transfer task.

For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Reflective Transfer, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Reflection is a chronological summary of completed work.

steps.title: Order the regression proof · Debug Reflective Transfer
steps.instruction:
Order the Reflective Transfer evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Order the regression proof · Debug Reflective Transfer.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Reflective Transfer assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise for the debug Reflective Transfer case

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Reflective Transfer
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Reflective Transfer: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A polished final story hides failed hypotheses, assistance, affected-user evidence, accessibility, threat decisions, incident recovery, and remaining non-claims. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Compare initial predictions with outcomes, explain changed mental models, identify retained misconceptions, and design a harder independent transfer task.

Evidence target: Publish the incident record · Debug Reflective Transfer.
steps.why: Retrieving Reflective Transfer through the concrete public capstone dossier and independent defense case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Publish the incident record · Debug Reflective Transfer, keep Reflective Transfer connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Compare initial predictions with outcomes, explain changed mental models, identify retained misconceptions, and design a harder independent transfer task.
